docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,050.00 FILED BY JOSEPH, MARTHA AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, PHILOMENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $3,316.00 FILED BY JOSEPH, PHILOMENA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JOSEPH, MARTHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-15-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED JUL-26-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT JOSEPH, MARTHA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED JUN-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, PHILOMENA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOSEPH, MARTHA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH, PHILOMENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2012 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT JOSEPH, PHILOMENA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT JOSEPH, MARTHA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
